title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman announces Pentagon deal with ‘technical safeguards’
description: OpenAI's CEO claims its new defense contract includes protections addressing the same issues that became a flashpoint for Anthropic.
content: OpenAI's CEO claims its new defense contract includes protections addressing the same issues that became a flashpoint for Anthropic.
